title: Tangy Chewy Spanish Garlic Stir-fry
description: A tangy and chewy brunch-friendly dish featuring minced garlic in a balanced sweet and savory sauce, perfect for those with diabetes.
instructions: Finely chop the garlic and mince the onions.
Peel and finely chop the tomatoes.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add butter if using, mix well and cook until the butter is melted.
Add minced garlic and onion to the hot pan. Sauté for about 2 minutes until they start to soften.
Toss in chopped tomatoes along with thyme leaves. Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
Stir-fry briefly, just enough to allow flavors to meld together without overcooking the vegetables.
Serve immediately as a side dish or garnish on top of a quiche or croissant for a delicious brunch treat.
